pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Edge-domain Data Architecture & Analytics KSA with insufficient signal strength (composite score 0.427) to justify inclusion for the AI CoE Leader. Without stronger framework alignment, this skill KSA does not meet the inclusion threshold.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No internal inconsistency identified. Domain scope, seniority fit, and signal level are internally consistent with exclusion.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Could this edge-domain skill KSA be expected in real-world AI CoE Leader roles, even if not core to the role definition?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Job market analysis and framework role definitions confirm Data Architecture & Analytics is not a standard competency expectation for AI CoE Leader. Edge-case exclusion is consistent with external evidence.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Upheld: external evidence does not support including this edge-domain KSA in the AI CoE Leader competency profile. Exclusion maintained.

decision_rationale: Insufficient signal (score 0.427) and edge-domain placement (Data Architecture & Analytics) do not meet inclusion threshold for the AI CoE Leader. All passes support exclusion.
